name: Wellnet Corporation
summary: Wellnet Corporation provides payment settlement, electronic billing, and electronic payment services in Japan. The company also develops and provides mobile authentication solutions. In addition, it provides payment secretary, a smartphone app for making payments directly from bank account; BusMori!, a service to buy highway bus tickets and commuter passes; BusMori! MONTA to manage seats in real time on a tablet device; and SUPER SUB, a cloud service that provides event application reception, payment collection/ticketing, and authentication services, as well as multi-payment, electronic ticket, electronic authentication, convenience store cash receiving, invoice issuance and storage, remittance, and various application services. The company was incorporated in 1983 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
